Choose your preferred time slot.' }, { icon: , title: 'Secure & Private', desc: 'Your health data is protected with industry-grade security measures.' }, { icon: , title: '24/7 Access', desc: 'Manage your appointments anytime, anywhere from any device.' }, ]; const stats = [ { value: '20+', label: 'Years of Experience' }, { value: '95%', label: 'Patient Satisfaction' }, { value: '5,000+', label: 'Patients Served' }, { value: '10+', label: 'Healthcare Providers' }, ]; const Home = () => (

How It Works

Get professional healthcare in just three simple steps

1

Find your Doctor

2

Book Appointment

3

Get Consultation

Meet your doctor at the scheduled time and receive top-tier personalized care.
